content:
This manuscript is:
• A meditation on grief, disappearance, and the limits of language
• Structured through vignettes, elliptical scenes, memory fragments
• Anchored in precise realist tone with mythic emotional weight

What your OS can do with it:
• Tag and track recurring emotional symbols (e.g., names, absences, repetitions)
• Visualize which narrative layers are literal vs abstract vs recursive
• Offer alternate publication formats:
• The story as-is
• An “OS-annotated” version with footnotes, remix metadata, symbolic framing
• A performative reading deck (D&D meets Table Read)

This isn’t a reinterpretation of his work.
It’s a multi-modal interface that honors his tone while adding optional new scaffolds.
